tools.name: deploy_fraud_detection_agent
tools.description: Deploy Fraud Detection Agent — three-layer detection (rules <1ms, ML <50ms, graph analysis), explainable decisions (PSD2), fraud ring network analysis, velocity checks, analyst feedback loop.

tools.name: evaluate_fraud_detection_agent
tools.description: Evaluate Fraud Detection Agent quality — precision/recall per layer, false positive rate, detection latency, graph coverage, explanation quality, feedback loop effectiveness.

tools.name: tune_fraud_detection_agent
tools.description: Tune Fraud Detection Agent — rule thresholds, ML model calibration, graph analysis depth, velocity windows, explanation format, feedback loop retrain schedule, cost.
